name: Altars of Worship
uniques: [+20]% Production when constructing [All] wonders [in cities following this religion]

name: God-King
uniques: [+1 Production, +1 Food, +1 Culture, +1 Faith, +1 Science, +1 Gold, +1 Happiness] [in capital]

name: Goddess of Love
uniques: [+1 Happiness] [in cities following this religion] <in cities with at least [3] [Population]>

name: Messenger of the Gods
uniques: [+2 Science, +1 Faith] from each Trade Route

name: Religious Settlements
uniques: [-15]% Culture cost of natural border growth [in cities following this religion]

name: Ceremonial Burial
uniques: [+1 Happiness] for each global city following this religion

name: Church Property
uniques: [+2 Gold, +1 Faith] for each global city following this religion

name: Initiation Rites
uniques: [+100 Gold] when a city adopts this religion for the first time <(modified by game speed)>

name: Messiah
uniques: [-25]% Faith cost of generating Great Prophet equivalents

name: Missionary Zeal
uniques: All newly-trained [Missionary] units [in this city] receive the [Missionary Zeal] promotion

name: Religious Unity
uniques: Resting point for Influence with City-States following this religion [+45]

name: Tithe
uniques: [+1 Gold] from every [4] global followers [in cities following this religion]

name: World Church
uniques: [+1 Culture] from every [6] global followers [in foreign cities]

name: Devoted Elite
uniques: [+3 Production, +3 Gold, -1 Happiness] [in cities following this religion] <in cities with at least [10] [Population]>

name: Guruship
uniques: [+1 Production, +2 Food, +1 Gold] [in cities following this religion] <in cities with at least [1] [Specialists]>

name: Holy Warriors
uniques: May buy [{Military} {Land}] units with [Faith] for [2] times their normal Production cost <in this city>

name: Apostolic Palace
uniques: [+5 Production, +5 Gold, +5 Food, +5 Science, +5 Culture, +5 Faith] from every [Grand Temple]

name: Defender of the Faith
uniques: [+15]% Strength <for [All] units> <when fighting in [Friendly Land] tiles>

name: Houses of Worship
uniques: May buy [Art Hall] buildings for [150] [Faith] [in cities following this religion]
May buy [Writing Auditorium] buildings for [150] [Faith] [in cities following this religion]
May buy [Vocal Chamber] buildings for [150] [Faith] [in cities following this religion]

name: Indulgences
uniques: [+1 Food, +1 Culture, +1 Production, +1 Gold, +1 Faith] [in cities following this religion]

name: Jesuit Education
uniques: May buy [Library] buildings for [60] [Faith] [in cities following this religion]
May buy [University] buildings for [220] [Faith] [in cities following this religion]
May buy [Observatory] buildings for [260] [Faith] [in cities following this religion]
May buy [Public School] buildings for [380] [Faith] [in cities following this religion]
May buy [Research Lab] buildings for [630] [Faith] [in cities following this religion]

name: Just War
uniques: [+20]% Strength <for [All] units> <when fighting in [Enemy Land] tiles>

name: Religious Troubadours
uniques: [+3 Faith] from [Sea Trade Route (Gold)] tiles [in cities following this religion]
[+3 Faith] from [Land Trade Route (Gold)] tiles [in cities following this religion]

name: Sanctified Innovations
uniques: [+1 Faith, +1 Production, +1 Science] from every [National Wonder]

name: Work Ethic
uniques: May buy [Workshop] buildings for [200] [Faith] [in cities following this religion]
May buy [Factory] buildings for [450] [Faith] [in cities following this religion]
May buy [Windmill] buildings for [320] [Faith] [in cities following this religion]
May buy [Hydro Plant] buildings for [520] [Faith] [in cities following this religion]

name: Underground Sect
uniques: [+1 Science] from every [4] global followers [in cities following this religion]
